##NAMES=Magnetite
##RRUFFID=R140861
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe^2+^Fe^3+^_2_O_4_
##LOCALITY=Bon Accord, Barberton District, Mpumalanga Province, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Dark green isolated granular or octahedral crystals, associated with yellowish-green irregular veins of nimite, minute light-green opaque grains of willemseite, reevesite as yellowish-green massive earthy vug material and limonite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140861
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Fe^2+^_0.82_Ni_0.18_)Fe^3+^_2.00_O_4_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.316 b: 8.316 c: 8.316 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 575.06 crystal system: cubic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
